message:
test(engine): add PearlTower test enrichments across 90 engine modules

Bulk addition of serde roundtrip, edge-case, error-variant, and
property-based tests appended to existing `mod tests` blocks in 90
source modules.  The enrichments cover:

- Serde roundtrip stability for configs, events, error types, and
  all enum variants (e.g., FrontierEventType all 6 variants,
  TrustRootSource, AttestationQuote, CampaignGeneratorConfig)
- Edge-case coverage: empty inputs, boundary values, capacity
  limits, zero-cost paths, default/sentinel values
- Error variant exercising: std::error::Error impl assertions,
  Display format stability, exhaustive error-path coverage
- Idempotency and commutativity checks on stateful operations
- Deterministic replay verification for ordering-sensitive flows

Modules enriched include: adversarial_campaign, assumptions_ledger,
attestation_handshake, baseline_interpreter, bayesian_error_recovery,
benchmark_e2e, canonical_evidence_emitter, capability_witness,
causal_replay, checkpoint_frontier (+745 lines), compiler_policy,
conformance_vector_gen, controller_interference_guard (+515 lines),
execution_cell (+328 lines), fork_detection (+544 lines),
tee_attestation_policy (+677 lines), semantic_twin (+597 lines),
semantic_twin_state_space (+800 lines), and 72 others.

Total: ~18,000 lines of new test coverage across the engine crate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
